findings.title: AI Product Launches March 2026: All Major Announcements | TLDL
findings.description: Complete list of AI product launches and announcements in March 2026. Covers OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, and major AI company releases. Updated daily.

findings.title: Ads funded by AI industry are flooding the 2026 election. They're about everything except AI.
findings.description: Competing super PACs backed by the AI industry are already pouring money into the 2026 midterms, starting with the year’s first primaries in Texas and North Carolina.

findings.title: India Built the World’s Back Office. A.I. Is Starting to Shrink It. - The New York Times
findings.description: Artificial intelligence promises to automate the white-collar work that made India a tech powerhouse. The country is racing to adapt before it’s too late.

findings.title: Wall St Week Ahead AI disruption looms over markets with US jobs data on tap | Reuters
findings.description: Prospects for artificial intelligence to disrupt business sectors should keep the U.S. stock market on edge in the coming week, as Wall Street looks for more insight into how the emerging technology will reverberate through the economy.

findings.description: But the next leap is coming. In 2026, AI won’t just summarize papers, answer questions and write reports — it will actively join the process of discovery in physics, chemistry and biology.
